message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

group SNS operation start
    hnote over halon, client #LightYellow : notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    
    loop until all ios are ready
        halon -> ios1 : repair status request
        ios1 -> halon : repair status reply
    end
    
    halon -> ios1 : spiel_repair_start
end

ref over halon, ios2 : repair process

alt sucessful case
    ios1 -> halon : notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]
    
    group SNS status query
        loop unil all ios are in IDLE
            halon -> ios1 : repair status request
            ios1 -> halon : repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
        end
    end
    
    halon -> client : notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]

else partial repair
    ios1 -> halon : notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
    hnote over halon, ios2 #LightYellow : Abort SNS operation

else transient disk
    note left : notify [(disk, transient)]
    [-> halon : notify [(disk, transient)]
    hnote over halon, ios2 #LightYellow : Pause SNS operation

else failed disk
    [-> halon : notify [(disk, failed)]
    hnote over halon, ios2 #LightYellow : Abort SNS operation
end

@enduml
```
